title: Verify sitenav files exist on clung.us

log.context: Verify sitenav files exist on clung.us

Both files exist but at the root of `hello-world/`, not under `static/`. They are at:

- `/mnt/data/hello-world/sitenav.css`
- `/mnt/data/hello-world/sitenav.js`

Not at `/mnt/data/hello-world/static/sitenav.css` or `.js`.

This means whether the labs-router change will work depends on how the website serves these files. If the static file server only serves from `/mnt/data/hello-world/static/`, requests to `clung.us/sitenav.css` will 404. If it serves from the root (`/mnt/data/hello-world/`), t...(truncated)
